raw_consumer_statement:
I am reporting the charging from Citi Bank on my XXXX XXXX credit card. 

According to my records, I reported the following transactions as fraudulent : XX/XX/year> {$560.00} ( XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX ) XX/XX/year> {$170.00} ( XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX ) XX/XX/year> {$260.00} ( XXXX XXXX XXXX  ) While I appreciate that credits have been issued for some of these transactions, the charge from XX/XX/year> ( totaling {$260.00} ) has not been properly resolved. 
All three transactions : Were unauthorized Were made to the same merchant ( XXXX ) Appear to be part of the same fraudulent activity Were reported together in my original dispute Given this, it is inconsistent and concerning that only a portion of the fraudulent transactions has been credited. 
I respectfully request : XXXX. Immediate review of the unresolved XX/XX/year> transactions XXXX. Issuance of the appropriate credits totaling {$260.00} XXXX. Written confirmation explaining why these charges were excluded from the original resolution, if applicable
